prestazioni: BMW B58B30M0 (3.0L inline-6) engine: Replace the stock turbo with a Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, 64mm turbine wheel) paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a CSF Racing B58-specific front-mount intercooler (bar-and-plate core, 1100cfm airflow capacity).

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management system with custom CAN bus integration for the Morgan-specific chassis wiring harness, including launch control, flat-foot shifting, and individual cylinder fuel trimming for the B58’s direct/injector setup.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (TTX46 MkII dampers) with Morgan Plus Six-specific spring rates (800lb/in front, 600lb/in rear) and adjustable top mounts for camber correction, paired with a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and a custom-fabricated rear sway bar (22mm solid) to mitigate the Plus Six’s unique ladder-frame chassis flex.
estetica: RML Group carbon fiber front splitter with integrated air curtains (Morgan Plus Six-specific mold, 3-piece construction) and a custom rear diffuser by Prior Design (carbon-Kevlar hybrid, 3-stage Gurney flap) to balance the car’s retro styling with modern aero efficiency.

Morgan Motor Company Heritage Edition ‘Aero 8’ style headlight conversion (LED projectors with DRL halos, sequential turn signals) paired with a custom-fabricated carbon fiber bonnet featuring a functional NACA duct for B58 intercooler airflow extraction.

BBS FI-R 19x9.5 (front) and 19x11 (rear) forged wheels (ET35 front, ET45 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear), with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fill the Plus Six’s wide fenders without fender modification.
